narrative:
Lincoln Township has 1,392 registered voters, with 55.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 35.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 25.4 percentage points.
